mood: Elegant, Romantic, High-End Editorial, Calming, Stress-free

typography.instructions: Use Playfair Display for all major headings to establish an elegant, editorial wedding feel. Use Outfit for data-heavy sections, UI elements, and body text to ensure modern clarity.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Lots of breathability to make the UI feel expensive and uncluttered.
layout_spacing.card: p-6 lg:p-8 rounded-2xl bg-white border border-[#EAE5DF] shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]
layout_spacing.bento_styles: Use optical alignment. Add generous padding inside cards. Avoid dense cramming of information.

auth.layout: Split screen layout: Left side elegant romantic image covering full height, right side pure white form container.
auth.style: Minimalist inputs, soft border, Playfair Display heading 'Welcome to Your Journey'. Google login button with soft shadow.

dashboard_cards.style: Soft surface. 'Crystal' or 'Tactile' variants. 1px delicate inner stroke 'border-[#EAE5DF]'. Avoid heavy shadows.
dashboard_cards.metrics: Large Playfair Display numbers for budget totals. Small crisp overlines for labels.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C5A880] text-white hover:bg-[#B0936A] rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 transition-all duration-300 shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#C5A880] text-[#C5A880] hover:bg-[#C5A880]/5 rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 transition-all duration-300

charts.style: Recharts with soft curves (type='monotone'). Use chart_palette. No harsh grid lines, subtle dotted axes if necessary.

forms.inputs: Shadcn inputs customized: rounded-lg border-[#EAE5DF] focus:border-[#C5A880] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C5A880]/20 bg-white shadow-sm h-12

navigation.style: Left sidebar or top fixed header with glassmorphism (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#EAE5DF]).
navigation.active_state: Text-[#C5A880] font-medium, subtle dot or line indicator.

motion_interactions.hover: Subtle lifts (-translate-y-0.5) and soft shadow expansions. duration-300 ease-out.
motion_interactions.page_transition: Fade in with slight upward motion (framer-motion initial={{opacity:0, y:10}} animate={{opacity:1, y:0}} transition={{duration:0.6}}).
motion_interactions.list_stagger: Stagger guest lists or expense items on load to feel graceful.

icons.style: Use strokeWidth={1.5} for a delicate, refined look matching the elegant theme.

auth_background.description: Elegant minimalist white floral arrangement, perfect for auth split-screen background.

empty_state_illustration.description: Editorial gold wedding rings. Can be used in empty states or onboarding.

profile_hero_placeholder.description: Elegant silhouette of a couple at sunset, suitable for user profile headers or welcome banners.

testing_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts: 'Playfair Display' and 'Outfit' and configure them in tailwind.config.js.
Do NOT use generic AI purple gradients.
Implement the UI with plenty of negative space.
Ensure all auth features (JWT + Google) are present.
Categories and sub-budgets should be easily nested visually.
Guest list tracking should have clear visual states (RSVP Pending/Attending) using the success/warning color palette.
Use Shadcn UI but heavily customize the borders and radii to match the 'card' guidelines above (rounded-2xl, soft borders).
